payload.label: side table
payload.short_description: dark brown wooden side table edge
payload.long_description: Partial crop showing the edge of a dark brown wooden side table with a turned/curved leg and a lower shelf; wood has a glossy finish and visible grain, one leg and shelf are cut off by the image border, and the object appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m away).
